        return -1
    visited = set()
    queue = [(start, 0)]
    while queue:
        current, distance = queue.pop(0)
        if current == end:
            return distance
        if current not in visited:
            visited.add(current)
            for neighbor, weight in graph[current]:
                queue.append((neighbor, distance + weight))
    return -1
